reviews.review_title: Best VR aim trainer on the market rn
reviews.review_description: Although there is little competition, this vr aim trainer has it all. Full calibration settings, loads of different scenarios, leaderboards, presets and even a pistol! If you are serious about getting better in any vr shooter, this will be your saviour. It is still in early access so it looks very bare bones, but all the functionality is there

reviews.review_title: Great way to learn VR aiming!
reviews.review_description: I struggled A LOT back in 2020 when I played pavlov, and I always wanted some sort of way to practice without being punished too much in-game. im sure a lot of players will find this trainer useful to get the hang of how VR shooters work with the loads of resources the game provides, and improve at their own pace. Amazing for Breachers and VAIL!

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for the kind review. 
Glad you enjoy the game🙌

reviews.review_description:
The preset for Vail on Quest 3 is NOT Vail. That’s the first thing I’d like to be fixed.
Second thing, is there a relatively accurate preset for freehanding and cstack (both with type 2) in Vail?

developer_response.body:
Presets are a hard thing we are still trying to get perfect.
Since games like VAIL has their own in-game configuration like controller profiles, one users perfect settings, might not fit all users.

Glad you like the game though!

We are working hard on improving the accuracy to other games 🔥

reviews.review_description: I just got the game and payed for the full access but although one the store it registered that I should have full access in the game it did not and said I still needed to upgrade

developer_response.body:
Hi! This is obviously a HUGE issue. We JUST implemented subscriptions in the last update, so I admit there's a chance for an issue. Can you message me on discord @hoggins and we'll get it sorted ASAP!

Edit:
I just deployed a fix that potentially should solve it. You are welcome to try again, and we should hopefully have it working better 💪

reviews.review_description: This aim trainer has increased my speed, accuracy, and muscle memory drastically. Overall a great aim trainer and it’s what I use to warm my self up for pro scrims and matches
5/5 would aim again (Hoggins has me in his basement send help)
Used this for 0.03 microseconds and got my KD from 0.67 to 21.69
lost lan but vraim let me hit crazy shots :fire:

I’ve been playing vr competitively for over 2 years now and this is exactly what I’ve been needing. If it’s a warmup pre game, or I’m actively working on a part of my aim it fulfills those goals. If you’re trying to improve your aim you will see an improvement with VR Aim
Doesn’t help with your aim in any way, it’s genuinely useless and won’t be using this anytime

developer_response.body:
Hi Envy,

It seems like you haven't launched the game at all? 
So I'm a little curious what brings you to leave a negative review? 

Thanks for taking your time to write a review though.
